purpose: Mechanism-isolation case study for irregular event-gap classification.

models.summary_features: Twelve aggregate statistics with ridge readout.
models.fixed_single_scale: Random recurrent encoder with one fixed time scale and ridge readout.
models.fixed_multi_scale: Random recurrent encoder with fixed heterogeneous time scales and ridge readout.
models.adaptive_decay: Random recurrent encoder with input-dependent event-gated decay and matched ridge readout.

task: Binary classification where the label depends on the time gap between a positive and a negative marker event under distractor spikes.

settings.in_distribution: Training and test background event times are sampled from the same uniform process.
settings.time_gap_shift: Test background event times are sampled from a clustered gamma process to stress irregular time gaps.
